fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Account Schedule Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the account schedule line that the chart is based on.

fields.name: Column Layout Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Column Layout Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Original Measure Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account schedule columns or lines that you select to include in the Account Schedules Chart Setup window.

fields.name: Measure Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account schedule columns or lines that the measures on the y-axis in the specific chart are based on.

fields.name: Measure Value
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Chart Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the account schedule values are represented graphically in the chart.
